channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Congress delays return to Washington due to winter storm
item.description: The House and Senate have postponed their first votes of the week from Monday to Tuesday, giving lawmakers an extra day to return to Washington as a w...

item.title: Never Trump Republicans are still issuing dire warnings. Is anyone listening?
item.description: Over and over, the Republicans and former Republicans who gathered just outside Washington this weekend warned that President Donald Trump and his all...

item.title: The Hypocrisy of Jon Meacham
item.description: His warning of a great ‘moral crisis’ ignores his own divisive rhetoric.

item.title: Everything I Learned About Show Biz Came from The Muppet Show
item.description: The 1976–1981 phase of the show remains wonderful entertainment for the whole family.

item.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent: Tariff revenue projections 'unchanged' after SCOTUS ruling
item.description: The U.S. is not projecting any changes to the tariff revenue it will take this year as President Trump is reissuing tariffs the Supreme Court struck d...

item.title: Trump says he's sending U.S. hospital ship to Greenland; local officials say, 'No thanks'
item.description: President Trump said he plans to send a U.S. hospital ship to Greenland, a semi-autonomous Danish territory that he wants to acquire, so its medical s...

item.title: ‘So Proud To Be Americans’: U.S. Men’s Hockey Team Defeats Canada In Overtime Battle For Olympic Gold
item.description: The U.S. men's national hockey team defeated Canada to earn Olympic gold, on the 46th anniversary of the 'Miracle on Ice.'

item.title: How Trump’s ‘Prior Authorization’ Deal Puts Patients Ahead of Paperwork
item.description: Speeding up insurers’ authorization process will deliver care more quickly and cut down on unnecessary red tape.

item.title: Don’t Prosecute Women for Abortion
item.description: While defending unborn children is essential, criminalizing women who have abortions is no way to show compassion.

item.title: Populism Is Having a Moment in Australia
item.description: Will it last? Only if the country’s One Nation party can avoid the pitfalls experienced by other populist parties.

item.title: Trump administration says it is in no rush to issue refunds to companies that paid tariffs
item.description: The Trump administration said Sunday it is in no rush to hand out refunds to companies that paid the tariffs nullified by a landmark Supreme Court rul...

item.title: 4 Of The Best Lines From Kavanaugh’s Masterclass Defense Of Trump’s Tariff Power
item.description: 'As they interpret the statute, the President could, for example, block all imports from China but cannot order even a $1 tariff on goods imported fro...

item.title: America Slides Into A Congress-Shaped Hole, And Gorsuch Helps
item.description: Our discussion, in media and in law, has been about Trump's excesses and boundary-crossing. A better starting place would be the laziness and uselessn...

item.title: Kavanaugh: Trump Obviously Has Tariff Power And Here’s How He Can Keep Using It
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court may have ruled against President Trump’s use of an emergency economics law to impose tariffs on foreign countries, but that doe...

item.title: CIA Yanks 19 Docs ‘Compromised’ By Leftist Activism, Including Threat Assessment Targeting ‘Traditional Motherhood’
item.description: The CIA’s commitment to advancing leftist activism appears to span at least three presidential administrations beginning in 2015.
